mapper.insert: insert into dcm_validation_record (batch_id, file_name, file_size, temp_path, sop_class_uid, media_storage_sop_class_uid, study_instance_uid, series_instance_uid, sop_instance_uid, modality, official_status, custom_status, final_status, error_count, warning_count, official_result_json, custom_result_json, orthanc_instance_id, create_by, create_time) values (#{batchId}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{tempPath}, #{sopClassUid}, #{mediaStorageSopClassUid}, #{studyInstanceUid}, #{seriesInstanceUid}, #{sopInstanceUid}, #{modality}, #{officialStatus}, #{customStatus}, #{finalStatus}, #{errorCount}, #{warningCount}, #{officialResultJson}, #{customResultJson}, #{orthancInstanceId}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
